user.title: BTicino Thermostat
user.description: Enter the IP address of your thermostat and the local PIN (XOpen password). Leave the PIN empty to retrieve it from the cloud.

cloud.title: Cloud Credentials
cloud.description: Enter your BTicino cloud credentials to retrieve the local password.

select_plant.title: Select Plant
select_plant.description: Multiple plants found. Select the one to use.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the thermostat. Check the IP address and make sure it is reachable.
error.no_password_found: No local password found in cloud data.
